summary: A reposted vertical TikTok clip (creator '@jazsmin30') consisting of a single static handheld phone shot of a group of TSA officers in uniform standing in a row singing Christmas carols at BWI airport, with on-screen caption 'TSA Carolers at BWI airport are top tier!'. It is a single-camera recording of a live performance.
notable_text: TSA Carolers at BWI airport are top tier!
